top_signals.title: TSMC’s CEO Pledges 30%-Plus Incentive Bump While AI Profits Soar
top_signals.summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. chief C.C. Wei told staff they’ll see more than a 30% bump in their profit-sharing payouts this year on average, responding after some voiced concerns over their incentive plans online.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: India’s Richest Civic Body Plans Nearly $1 Billion Muni Bonds
top_signals.summary: India’s richest civic authority is planning to raise as much as 95 billion rupees ($992 million) through municipal debt in one or more tranches, marking its foray into the local-currency bond market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin clings to $75,000 support as bear market signals resurface
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Blair calls for ‘coherent plan’ before Labour ousts Starmer
top_signals.summary: Labour's electoral losses earlier this month sparked an internal rebellion as near a quarter of the party's members of Parliament called for Starmer to go.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2026
top_signals.summary: Today, the iron ore futures market showed weak fluctuations. The main contract I2609 finally closed at 781.5 RMB/ton, down slightly by 0.32% from the previous trading session. Port spot prices remained largely unchanged from the previous day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting; steel mills made few inquiries, with a stronger wait-and-see sentiment and cautious ...
